initial_required_verify.note: The first required active c2 verify after the c4 hard demotion printed 104. This was treated as the known intermittent c2 sampler-stability risk, not caused by the c4-only code change; three immediate explicit repeats were green and repeat 3 was copied back to /tmp/hipengine-e2e-native-c2-512-128.json before measurement.

change.description: Demote c4 auto full-attention rowchunk scope from selected layer 11 back to all-layer rowchunk2 because the hard rows4..7 fixture fails under the layer-11-only scope but passes all-layer rowchunk2.
change.new_c4_auto_rowchunk_meaning: all full-attention producer layers when row_chunk_size=2

commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
commands.postchange_hard_default: same no-flag command after code change --json /tmp/hipengine-iter360-hard-c4-layer11/postchange-c4-hard-default.json

conclusion: C4 layer-11-only rowchunk is primary-fixture green but not prompt/window-stable: hard rows4..7 failed at [45,11,68,137]. Explicit all-layer rowchunk2 passed [137]*4, and after demoting the no-flag c4 default back to all-layer rowchunk2 both hard rows4..7 and the primary first-four fixture passed [137]*4. This is correctness-first full-attention blocker evidence only; c4 still reports native_caware_decode=false and no retained throughput/scaling claim is made.

prompt_verifier.evidence: Pass: a focused c4 full-attention boundary was made green for the hard rows4..7 fixture with a code change and artifact evidence, while preserving primary c4 [137]*4 and active c2 final [137,137] on GPU1/XTX. No retained throughput/scaling claim.

blockers: native c>N decode currently supports compact physical-slot-ordered rows; full-attention batch context is native only for BF16 KV and context < 1024
native c>N decode is experimental and blocked until generated-token equality passes
full-attention decode forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path on selected layers
